docs.title: This will host the project documentation
The idea
docs.text: Based on my previous prototype during my IoT thematic semester in HvA1, I want to build a complete weather station, featuring an embedded device with sensors, a screen and a nice-looking case and a fullstack app to operate the station and monitor the data.

docs.title: Initial status
docs.text: I currently own couple basic components such as an ESP32, a breadboard, cables and some captors. The idea is to first define a Bill of Materials so I know what I need to buy, and then move on to coding.

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text:
• [ ] Define BOM
  • [ ] Purchase components
  • [ ] Install PlatformIO
  • [ ] Embedded part
  • [ ] Webapp application

References:

  1. https://wiiteexiimii36-iot-2024-2025-semester-1-individu-7ec652b1e1a340.dev.hihva.nl ↩
